packages.name: koppa-portscan
packages.description: Advanced TCP/UDP port scanner with service detection and banner grabbing

packages.name: koppa-webfuzz
packages.description: Web fuzzer — directory/file brute-force, parameter injection, vhost discovery

packages.name: koppa-jwt-attack
packages.description: JWT token attack toolkit — decode, forge, alg-none, brute-force secret

packages.name: koppa-hashcrack
packages.description: Hash identification and cracking — MD5/SHA/bcrypt/NTLM wordlist & rules

packages.name: koppa-recon
packages.description: Passive & active recon — subdomain enum, DNS, WHOIS, email harvest

packages.name: koppa-exploit
packages.description: Exploit helper — CVE lookup, payload gen, shellcode, reverse shell builder

packages.name: koppa-evasion
packages.description: AV/EDR evasion — AMSI bypass, ETW patch, anti-debug, anti-VM, obfuscation

packages.name: koppa-bruteforce
packages.description: Multi-protocol brute forcer — SSH, FTP, HTTP, SMB, RDP, MySQL, Redis

packages.name: koppa-c2-client
packages.description: KOPPA-C2 agent — connect to C2, execute tasks, exfil data over HTTP/DNS

packages.name: koppa-sqli
packages.description: SQL Injection tester — error-based, blind, time-based, union, dump tables

packages.name: koppa-xss
packages.description: XSS scanner — reflected, stored, DOM, polyglot, CSP bypass, steal cookies

packages.name: koppa-lfi
packages.description: LFI/RFI tester — path traversal, log poisoning, PHP wrapper, RCE via LFI

packages.name: koppa-ssrf
packages.description: SSRF detection — internal scan, cloud metadata (AWS/GCP), protocol smuggling

packages.name: koppa-privesc
packages.description: Privilege escalation checker — Linux SUID/sudo/cron, Windows services/registry

packages.name: koppa-ad
packages.description: Active Directory attacks — Kerberoasting, AS-REP, Pass-the-Hash, BloodHound, spray

packages.name: koppa-network-map
packages.description: Network mapping — host discovery, OS detection, service fingerprint, vuln scan

packages.name: koppa-api
packages.description: API security tester — endpoint discovery, auth bypass, IDOR, rate-limit, GraphQL

packages.name: koppa-stealth
packages.description: Stealth ops — DNS/ICMP tunnel, log cleanup, process hiding, port forward, timestomp

packages.name: koppa-phish
packages.description: Phishing toolkit — clone sites, credential harvester, email spoofer, payload delivery
